title: オークスの後に・主役

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess crosses the finish line! She's
claimed first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(I can't catch my breath... I just want to collapse
in a heap right now... The sky feels so far away...
My legs feel all wobbly...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(But... it really does feel amazing... moving my
body with everything I've got. In this moment
right now...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (This... is how a princess runs!)

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: You were really, really, really awesome out there!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, indeed. I'm a princess, after all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Victory is the only outcome fit for a story's
heroine! And today's heroine is none other than
me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Now, feast your eyes on this, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Kawakami Princess just leaped up onto the
fence!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before anyone can stop her, Kawakami stands
atop the fence and pumps both her fists
vigorously into the sky.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I ask for your continued support! Next, I'm going
to dominate the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow, this is her turf now!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Haha, nice one, Princess! You're today's lead star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess continues to roar with
laughter as I hurry to get her down from the fence
before she hurts herself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm very sorry about that. The old me came to the
surface for a moment...
choice_data_list:
Don't go pulling dangerous stunts like that,
okay?

Don't go pulling dangerous stunts like that,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. That was a great race out there today. I work on the show Meet the Racers!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you the one who made that special
promo video?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Every door, every wall, and every competitor
crumbles! The Princess has entered the fray!"

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's the one. And so, I wanted to ask...

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to do a collaboration with us? I
want to feature you for the Shuka Sho, too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my. It would be great if you could make a video inspired by Princess Fighter☆Stars this time!
choice_data_list:
We'll consider it, so if you could reach back out
to us later—

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Wow, great! Thank you so much. I hope to hear
some good news!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! Leave it to me! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we head outside, Kawakami Princess's head is
filled with thoughts of being on TV. I remind her
once again not to do anything dangerous.
choice_data_list: Let's grab a sports drink on the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After claiming first place, Kawakami Princess has
been thrust into the leading role.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if the competition itself wasn't exhausting
enough, she's bound to feel pressure from the
attention, too. To help her through it, I decide to
buy her some of her favorite sweets.

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(I've seen this racer's face before—she was at the
press conference for the Japanese Oaks.)

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I let you down despite your support!

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Please don't apologize. To me and many, you are
our Queen of the Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume's Fan
text_block_list.text:
I know that you can definitely, absolutely win the
Shuka Sho. So... please don't cry!

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Right! I swear I'll win the next race. I'll take the
leading role in the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are many other Umamusume betting
everything on the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But on the prestigious stage that is the Japanese
Oaks, it was Kawakami Princess who shone
brighter than the rest.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome back, Trainer! What's that bag in
your hand?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, thank you! I was just thinking of filling my
stomach with delicious sweets, too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm going to do my best during the concert
as well, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll be dazzling up on stage.
I'm sure you'll be dazzling up on stage.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take my seat in the crowd at the concert where
only winners of the Tiara tour can perform...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I watch on as Kawakami Princess sings Brilliant Phantasia.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal will be the final stop in the Tiara
tour—the Shuka Sho.
